puzzle.hint: This verse encourages believers to find strength and support in two fundamental acts of worship during difficulties.
puzzle.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱسْتَعِينُوا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ وَٱلصَّلَوٰةِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ مَعَ ٱلصَّـٰبِرِينَ
puzzle.verseEn: O you who have believed, seek help through patience and prayer. Indeed, Allāh is with the patient.
